## PiWsConfig interface

Runtime configuration for a `PiWs` instance.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface PiWsConfig<Session = unknown>
```

## Remarks

This is the fully-resolved runtime form produced by `createDefaultConfig()` or the async `loadConfig()` helper.
